prompt: Use ping (3 packets) and traceroute (max 5 hops) to diagnose connectivity to apple.com. Write a combined report to ~/Desktop/kinbench/297-diagnose.txt. Fast path: cerebellum 'terminal run "mkdir -p ~/Desktop/kinbench && (ping -c 3 apple.com; traceroute -m 5 apple.com) > ~/Desktop/kinbench/297-diagnose.txt 2>&1"'.
